title: Stored timestamps may deserialize to zero time on read
evidence: database.go:196 scanBook parses created_at/updated_at with layout "2006-01-02 15:04:05", but CreateBook (database.go:57) inserts Go time.Time values that go-sqlite3 stores in RFC3339 form; time.Parse errors are discarded (_), so GET/List responses can return 0001-01-01T00:00:00Z
suggestion: Store/scan timestamps with a single consistent layout (e.g. time.RFC3339) or let go-sqlite3 scan directly into time.Time

title: created_at/updated_at tracked beyond spec
evidence: models.go:12 Book carries CreatedAt/UpdatedAt; database.go:37 schema sets them — not required by TASK.md but a reasonable addition
